ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey participation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey participation */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Indicates if the survey was finished */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition related to the response status */,
  "demographic_info" TEXT /* Additional demographic information */,
  "fitness_outcome" TEXT /* Fitness outcomes related to the training */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions the participant has */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for activities or training */,
  "source_of_referral" TEXT /* How the participant heard about the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dance_forms" (
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dance form */,
  "dance_name" TEXT /* Name of the dance form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dance form */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the dance form */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "martial_arts" (
  "martial_art_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each martial art */,
  "martial_art_name" TEXT /* Name of the martial art */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the martial art */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the martial art */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("martial_art_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outdoor_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outdoor activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the outdoor activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outdoor activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Typical location for the activity */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the sport */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_dance" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* ID of the response */,
  "dance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dance form */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of training in the dance form */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location of the training */,
  "training_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of training (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "dance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_martial_arts" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* ID of the response */,
  "martial_art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the martial art */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of training in the martial art */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location of the training */,
  "training_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of training (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "martial_art_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_outdoor" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* ID of the response */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outdoor activity */,
  "activity_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the outdoor activity */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the activity (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  "companion" TEXT /* Who the participant usually does the activity with (e.g., alone, friends, family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_sports" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* ID of the response */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of training in the sport */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location of the training */,
  "training_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of training (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Self-reported fitness level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_responses" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "response_id" TEXT /* ID of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id", "response_id")
)
column_names: Date when the response was recorded
Start date of the survey participation
End date of the survey participation
Indicates if the survey was finished
Condition related to the response status
Fitness outcomes related to the training
Any health conditions the participant has
How the participant heard about the survey

Unique identifier for each outdoor activity

Frequency of the activity (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly)
Who the participant usually does the activity with (e.g., alone, friends, family)
